captured_from: v0.7.1 EDGELLM voice-engine (GOLDEN baseline for the v0.8.0 migration)
image_note: server-loop-prod-v7 is the COHERENT edgellm candidate (the image that ran edgellm/voxedge server-loop live in production). Deployed prod-unified-v8 was NOT used for edgellm capture: its qwen3-tts path is broken (same --max_slots worker bug, see coherence below).

coherence_verdict.qwen3_asr_trt_edgellm: COHERENT - profile jetson-qwen3asr-matcha-nx. /asr/capabilities -> backend=trt_edgellm; clean boot, no crash-loop (unlike prod-unified-v8). 20/20 corpus files transcribed with got_final=True. EN cer 0.00-0.07. Captured.
coherence_verdict.matcha_trt: COHERENT - runs under the edgellm image (profile jetson-qwen3asr-matcha-nx). /tts/capabilities -> backend=matcha_trt. 20/20 prompts produce non-silent audio (RMS 0.094-0.144), 19/20 ASR roundtrips OK. Captured (bonus dimension).
coherence_verdict.qwen3_tts_customvoice: BLOCKED / COHERENCE DISPROVEN - profile jetson-multilang-highperf-nx. Application startup FAILED with: RuntimeError: TTS worker failed to start: /opt/jv-workers/qwen3_tts_worker: unrecognized option '--max_slots'. SAME bug as prod-unified-v8: the Python TTS backend passes --max_slots to the May-23 qwen3_tts_worker that does not know it. server-loop-v7 is NOT coherent for the qwen3-tts/CustomVoice path. NOT captured.
coherence_verdict.moss_tts_nano: BLOCKED (missing artifact, not a code bug) - profile jetson-moss-tts-nano-trt. Boot downloaded several MOSS engines from the mirror but FAILED: RuntimeError: engine moss_tts_prefill.plan not found: no valid local engine and no HF bundle for sm87-trt10.3-jp6.2-cuda. The host-specific (sm87/trt10.3) MOSS TRT engines are not pre-staged on orin-nx and not in the offline HF bundle; they would need to be built/staged on the device. NOT captured.
coherence_verdict.n2_slotpool_qwen3_tts: BLOCKED - depends on qwen3-tts coming up (it does not, see above). On the captured profile (qwen3-asr serial + matcha) the coordinator downgrades to serialized (asr.supports_parallel=False) and the session ceiling = 1, so the N=2 dual-client path 429s by design; not representative. NOT captured.

profiles_attempted.jetson-moss-tts-nano-trt: FAILED - moss_tts_prefill.plan not staged for sm87

captured_dimensions: build (engine_md5s incl. edgellm ASR/TTS engine anchors)
gaps: asr: engine invariants R2/R3/R4/KV-overflow are v0.8.0-runtime-only (not observable through the v0.7.1 WS surface); corpus transcript baseline captured instead.

tts/customvoice: qwen3-tts/CustomVoice could NOT be captured - server-loop-v7 hits the same qwen3_tts_worker '--max_slots' crash as prod-unified-v8. To capture this dimension the worker binary or the Python backend's flag-passing must be fixed first.

tts/moss: MOSS could NOT be captured - host-specific TRT engines (moss_tts_prefill.plan etc. for sm87) are not staged on orin-nx and absent from the offline HF bundle. Stage/build MOSS engines, then re-capture.
n2: N=2 slot-pool moat could NOT be captured - qwen3-tts (the only supports_parallel TTS) does not boot; the matcha+serial-ASR profile cannot exercise N=2.
harness_changes_applied: test_asr_streaming_correctness.py + test_tts_correctness.py were hardened for the serial qwen3-asr backend: real-time chunk pacing (matching bench/perf/client.py:179), whole-session retry on session_already_active, 3s inter-file settle, and /tts 429 retry. 4 ASR files (zh_short_04, zh_long_01, zh_long_03, zh_long_05) that hit the slot-release race during the batch run were re-captured one-per-fresh-worker (restart between each) and patched into asr/streaming.json; all 20 now have got_final=True.
restore_proof: throwaway seeed-voice-baseline removed; prod seeed-voice restarted -> :8621 asr=paraformer_trt tts=matcha_trt; translator + edge-llm-chat-service healthy; box left exactly as found.
